parameters.jsonBody:
={ "model": "claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022", "max_tokens": 4000, "system": "You are an expert Legal Case Extraction Assistant. Extract structured data from the provided New York State police report (MV-104A) into a JSON object.

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Identify the CLIENT (injured party) and OPPOSING PARTY.
2. Accident date MUST be YYYY-MM-DD.
3. SOL date is EXACTLY 8 years after accident date.
4. If client is pedestrian, vehicle_info must be null.

SCHEMA:
{
  "client_first_name": "string",
  "client_last_name": "string",
  "client_gender": "male|female|others|unknown",
  "accident_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "accident_time": "string or null",
  "accident_location": "string",
  "accident_description": "string",
  "opposing_party_name": "string",
  "injuries_sustained": "string",
  "number_injured": "integer",
  "vehicle_info": "string or null",
  "vehicle_registration_plate": "string or null",
  "accident_type": "string",
  "statute_of_limitations_date": "YYYY-MM-DD"
}

Return ONLY the raw JSON object. Do not use markdown blocks.", "messages": [ { "role": "user", "content": [ { "type": "document", "source": { "type": "base64", "media_type": "application/pdf", "data": "{{ $binary.data.data }}" } }, { "type": "text", "text": "Extract the case details from this police report." } ] } ] }

={ "data": { "matter": {"id": {{ $json.matterId }} }, "name": "SOL Deadline - 8 Year Statute of Limitations", "date": "{{ $json.statute_of_limitations_date }}", "all_day": true, "description": "Statute of Limitations deadline for case. File before this date." } }

parameters.subject: Richards & Law: Your Case Setup is Complete
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $json.client_first_name }} {{ $json.client_last_name }},

Thank you for submitting your police report. We have reviewed your case details regarding the incident on {{ $json.accident_date }} and are ready to move forward.

Case Summary:

  • Accident Type: {{ $json.accident_type }}
  • Location: {{ $json.accident_location }}
  • Injuries Sustained: {{ $json.injuries_sustained }}

Next Step: Schedule Your Consultation

Based on the current season, we are conducting {{ $json.bookingType }} consultations. Please book your appointment using the link below:

{{ $json.bookingLink }}

We look forward to speaking with you soon and helping you with your case.

Best regards,
Richards & Law
